profile.heading: Profile
profile.lead: Update your username, email, or password. You must confirm your current password first; only you can change your own account.
profile.totpHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app (required because two-factor authentication is enabled).
profile.invalidTotp: Invalid code. Check your authenticator app and try again.
profile.verifyFailed: Could not verify your password. Try again.
profile.emailChangeHint: Changing your email signs you out on all devices.
profile.passwordChangeHint: Changing your password signs you out on all devices.
profile.nothingToSave: Change at least one field before saving.
profile.sessionExpired: Verification expired. Enter your password again.

totpLead: Add your account to Google Authenticator or another TOTP app, then confirm with a 6-digit code.
totpSwitchHint: Turn on to link an authenticator app; turn off by entering a current code.
disableLead: To disable TOTP, enter a 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
statusDisabledSuccess: Two-factor authentication (TOTP) has been turned off.
hintScan: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app.
enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your app.
statusUnauthorized: Session expired. Please sign in again.
statusInvalidCode: Invalid code. Check your authenticator and try again.
statusNestUnavailable: TOTP setup is not available (check server database and TOTP_ENCRYPTION_KEY).

deleteAccount.heading: Delete my account
deleteAccount.passwordRequired: You must confirm your current password before you can delete your account.
deleteAccount.totpHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app (required because two-factor authentication is enabled).
deleteAccount.invalidTotp: Invalid code. Check your authenticator app and try again.
deleteAccount.verifyFailed: Could not verify your password. Try again.
deleteAccount.sessionExpired: Verification expired. Enter your password again.
deleteAccount.lead: Permanently removes your account and sessions. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.leadTeamsAndReports: On a report team: if you are a mentor or quality checker, only your membership is removed — the draft and team stay for the primary hunter and other members. If you are the primary hunter and at least one other hunter remains on the team, the first remaining hunter becomes the draft’s primary owner (you will see this on your report workspace). Otherwise, drafts you solely own are deleted.
deleteAccount.leadLastSuperAdmin: If you are the last Lead (super-admin), deletion is blocked.
deleteAccount.confirm: Permanently delete your account and all related data? You will be signed out and cannot sign in again with this identity.
